case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. SVETALANA PONOMAREVA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PONOMAREVA, SVETALANA $2,295.22 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,345.72, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT, SVETALANA PONOMAREVA, RETURNED "ADDRESS UNDELIVERED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
